comment.text: This key displays the maximum allowed file size for single file uploads. It appears as a label within the Uploader component of the Portal Settings, specifically when multiple uploads are not enabled. Translators should ensure the translation accurately conveys the size limit for an individual file.

usage.context:
<SizeLimitSetter
 labelText={
 config.isMultipleUpload
 ? config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSizePerFolder")
 : t("MaximumFileSizePerFile")
 : config.isFolderUpload
 ? t("MaximumFolderSize")
 : t("MaximumFileSize")
 }
 tooltipText={
